title: Upper-Realm Powers Feed on Ascended Cultivators
secret: Ascension is not transcendence, but entry into a pasture kept by upper-realm powers; cultivators who reach the peak of this world are only ripened spirit herbs and blood food.

title: This World's Sky Is False
secret: The sky is not a natural firmament, but a vast masking barrier; the sun, moon, and stars are projections, and the true world is sealed inside some vessel or prison.

title: The Will of Heaven Has Gone Mad
secret: The will of Heaven that sustains this world's order has broken down; tribulation lightning, fortune, karma, and lifespan still operate, but more and more like the spasms of a deranged thing.

title: The World Is Simulated Code
secret: The cultivation world is a simulation: spiritual qi, realms, fate, and events are all driven by unseen code; what cultivators call enlightenment is only contact with rule interfaces.

title: Spiritual Qi Is the Memory of the Dead
secret: Heaven-and-earth spiritual qi is not born naturally, but is the diluted echo of memories ground down after generations of living beings die; when cultivators absorb qi, they are devouring the broken dreams of countless dead.

title: All Sects Are Built on Colossal Corpses
secret: The famed mountains and rivers of this world are not natural formations, but weathered shells of ancient colossal beasts; the spirit veins beneath the great sects are actually marrow and meridians that have not yet cooled.

title: Reincarnation Does Not Exist; Rebirth Is Copying
secret: Mortals believe souls reincarnate, but so-called rebirth is only Heaven manufacturing copies from residual information; the true dead have never returned.

title: The Yao Were Humans from the Previous Era
secret: The yao are not an alien race, but the warped surviving descendants of humanity from a previous era after the world's reset; the war between humans and yao is kin slaughtering kin after forgetting itself.

title: Cultivation Realms Are Artificial Shackles
secret: Qi Refining, Foundation Establishment, Golden Core, Nascent Soul, and the other realms are not the natural Great Dao, but level locks imposed by ancient beings to limit cultivators' growth.

title: The Moon Is an Eye Watching This World
secret: The moon is not a star, but a gigantic eye suspended beyond the heavens; moonlight is its gaze, and cultivators who absorb it are gradually recorded and marked.

title: Secret Realms Are Tumors Grown by the World
secret: Secret realms are not blessed grotto-heavens, but lesions formed by erroneous overgrowth of the world's rules; cultivators who enter them for treasure are feeding on diseased tissue of the world.

title: The Gods and Buddhas Are Dead; Their Corpses Answer Prayers
secret: The gods and buddhas sensed through worldly rites are not living deities, but automatic responses left in ancient divine corpses; the more believers there are, the more those corpses begin to twitch again.
